sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94948" key="skirthtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκιρτ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n94948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skittish, unruly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.12b</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
